tasks.subject: [agent-list-settings] [P1] Build the agent-attention derivation module
tasks.description: Create entities/session/model/agent-attention.ts: AttentionState type, ATTENTION_THRESHOLDS constants, pure deriveAttention(), and useAgentAttentionMap() with the single-subscription fold (spec §1). Verify borderKindFromLifecycle's output enum and map pendingApproval → needs-attention, streaming → active; fold any error/blocked kind into needs-attention. Full deriveAttention unit matrix + hook tests with mock store.

tasks.subject: [agent-list-settings] [P1] Extend SidebarPrefs/SidebarGroup schemas + config migration
tasks.description: Add SidebarDisplayFilterSchema, displayFilter + muted on SidebarGroupSchema, muted[] + ungroupedDisplayFilter on SidebarPrefsSchema (spec §2), all defaulted. Semver-keyed conf migration per the adding-config-fields skill. Schema tests: new defaults, legacy parse, round-trip.

tasks.subject: [agent-list-settings] [P2] Implement filterSectionAgents + reveal rows + Show menu
tasks.description: Pure filter-agents.ts implementing the filter × mute × state matrix (spec §3, incl. the muted needs-attention downgrade — the ONE place mute semantics live). Ghost reveal rows ('N hidden' / 'N inactive agents', local expand state). 'Show' radio submenu in group + ungrouped header menus writing config. Exhaustive matrix tests + RTL component tests.

tasks.subject: [agent-list-settings] [P3] Wire mute end-to-end
tasks.description: Agent-row context-menu mute toggle (ui.sidebar.muted) + group-header mute toggle (groups[i].muted). Muted rendering: dim + glyph, no attention badge, excluded from rollup dots (refactor useAgentsAggregateStatus to the shared fold with muted exclusion, back-compat signature). Group mute is a lens (never writes member paths). Pinned copies render muted. Component tests for atomicity: badge + dot + emphasis all drop together.

tasks.subject: [agent-list-settings] [P4] Docs, changelog fragment, implementation report
tasks.description: Docs-site sidebar guide section (filters, inactive reveal, muting — writing-for-humans register), changelog fragment, 04-implementation.md, manifest → implemented. Existing DOR-329 suites green; pnpm verify clean.
